tasks.subject: Task 0: Pure choreography engine + DRY relocation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the pure zero-import `chain-recap.js` (`buildRecapStoryboard` + the relocated `selectChainEntries`/`scoreChainEntry`); `ui-sharecard.js` imports them back and re-exports them so its public surface is byte-stable.

**Files:** Create public/js/ui/chain-recap.js + client-tests/chain-recap.test.js; Modify public/js/ui/ui-sharecard.js (remove fn defs at L183-231; add import + re-export after L7).

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest client-tests/chain-recap.test.js ‚Üí PASS; then cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest ‚Üí all green (additive over 55/437).

**Steps:** TDD ‚Äî write chain-recap.test.js (schema/order/determinism, cap reuse, finale-parity for all 5 winner branches, elimination best-effort both-ways, zero-identity sentinel, relocation reference-equality + output parity) ‚Üí verify FAIL (module missing) ‚Üí create chain-recap.js (verbatim relocated scoreChainEntry/selectChainEntries + BEAT_MS frozen consts + buildFinalePayload pure replica of showGameOverBanner L872-893 + buildRecapStoryboard intro‚Üí(bridge?‚Üílink)‚Üískipped?‚Üífinale) ‚Üí edit ui-sharecard.js (import {selectChainEntries,scoreChainEntry} from ./chain-recap.js + re-export; DELETE the two duplicated fn defs) ‚Üí verify GREEN ‚Üí full npx jest ‚Üí branch-verify + commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/chain-recap.js", "public/js/ui/ui-sharecard.js", "client-tests/chain-recap.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest client-tests/chain-recap.test.js && cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["chain-recap.js zero-import & pure (no DOM/window/timers/Date/RNG)", "buildRecapStoryboard returns spec-¬ß3.1 ordered beats; atMs=cumsum(durMs), index=ordinal, durMs=frozen per-type const", "curation reuses relocated selectChainEntries (‚â§7) + single skipped beat iff skipped>0", "finale.winnerLine/subLine char-identical to showGameOverBanner for all 5 winner branches", "elimination beat only if entry.eliminated===true; absent on realistic fixtures (no fabrication)", "zero-identity sentinel green (no stableId/socket id in any beat)", "long no-elim chain total atMs+durMs ‚â§ 13000", "ui-sharecard re-exports SAME refs as chain-recap; output parity holds; server/** untouched; full npx jest green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Recap overlay driver + wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the thin `recap-player.js` driver, the additive `#recap-overlay` skeleton, the append-only recap CSS, and the one-shot Daily-suppressed wiring in `socketClient.js` ‚Äî with `ui-render.js`/`showGameOverBanner` byte-identical and the ¬ß5 surfaces unchanged.

**Files:** Create public/js/ui/recap-player.js + client-tests/recap-player.test.js; Modify public/index.html (additive #recap-overlay after L564), public/css/04-modals.css (append-only after L610), public/css/06-states-anim.css (append-only after L1214), public/js/socketClient.js (add playRecap to ui.js import L14; one block after the Daily block L499).

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest client-tests/recap-player.test.js ‚Üí PASS; then cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest ‚Üí all green; then git diff ed6f041 -- public/js/ui/ui-render.js = EMPTY; CSS/index.html/socketClient diffs additive-only; server/ diff EMPTY.

**Steps:** TDD ‚Äî write recap-player.test.js (reduced-motion instant-settle+onDone+no-timer, animated path schedules+resolves, Skip‚Üísettled, Replay‚Üírestart, Close‚Üíhide, null mount no-op, poster fallback) ‚Üí verify FAIL (module missing) ‚Üí create recap-player.js (buildRecapStoryboard sync; beatNode createElement/textContent + attachPosterFallback; cancelRecap leak-safe; prefersReducedMotion‚Üísettle(true); else setTimeout-chain w/ is-in rAF) ‚Üí add #recap-overlay sibling in index.html after L564 ‚Üí append recap structural CSS to 04-modals.css EOF + compositor entrance to 06-states-anim.css EOF ‚Üí add playRecap to socketClient ui.js import + the `if (justFinished && !getIsDaily())` block after the Daily block ‚Üí verify GREEN ‚Üí diff-gate (ui-render.js EMPTY; server/ EMPTY; CSS append-only; index.html additive sibling; socketClient import+one-block only) ‚Üí full npx jest ‚Üí branch-verify + commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/recap-player.js", "public/index.html", "public/css/04-modals.css", "public/css/06-states-anim.css", "public/js/socketClient.js", "client-tests/recap-player.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest client-tests/recap-player.test.js && cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["playRecap builds storyboard sync, renders into #recap-overlay, removes hidden", "prefersReducedMotion ‚Üí instant settled end-state + onDone, no timer", "animated path = single cancellable setTimeout chain; cancelRecap leak-safe", "#recap-skip‚Üísettled, #recap-replay‚Üírestart, #recap-close‚Üíhide; posters via attachPosterFallback", "wiring fires once on justFinished && !getIsDaily(); never Daily; never on re-render", "ui-render.js byte-identical vs ed6f041; socketClient.js = import add + one block only; CSS append-only no new @media/colour; index.html additive sibling only", "render-chain/socket-handlers/showScreen/lobby suites/server/** byte-identical & green; full npx jest green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Focused Share Cards 2.0
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the spoiler-free emoji grid + "I survived N links" line to the existing share card (canvas + text recap), additively ‚Äî existing `ui-sharecard.js` exports byte-stable, `#share-modal` markup + Share button + modal wiring unchanged.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-sharecard.js (add buildEmojiGrid + survivedLine; additive draws in generateShareCard; additive lines in buildTextRecap); Create client-tests/sharecard.test.js.

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest client-tests/sharecard.test.js ‚Üí PASS; then cd C:/mm-phase7-6 && npx jest ‚Üí all green; ui-sharecard.js diff additive-only; #share-modal markup unchanged; server/ diff EMPTY.
